title: Kabr-i Cin Mühür
overview: The book written by a good gin from the Qur'an once centuries ago comes to protectors every hundred years. These protectors are called Guardians. In 1365, Demirci goes to the city of Bukhari in Egypt again to solve a case of a genie.
